title: Warp Pads
description: Warp Pads adds Steven Universe inspired warp pads that you can use to teleport between locations in your world!
body: Warp Pads adds Steven Universe inspired warp pads that you can use to teleport between locations in your world! Starting in version 2.0, this mod requires [Architectury API.](https://modrinth.com/mod/architectury-api) To craft a warp pad, combine quartz blocks, iron ingots, and an ender eye in the crafting table. Upon right clicking a new warp pad, you can change its name and optionally add a dye to change the warp beam's color. Existing warp pads can also be edited by crouching and right clicking them. To teleport to other warp pads, right click a warp pad and select a target warp pad from the list. Normal warp pads can only travel to warp pads within the same dimension. However, they can be upgraded (see recipes below) to allow interdimensional travel. ![Recipes](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/afd62672fc170ab0f2e2376e25de72e647b68ba2.png)
